EVAL-IMG-001.original_query: Getting intermittent power to my nav lights but the landing light is fine. Breaker hasn't popped. Wondering if there's a shared bus issue.
EVAL-IMG-001.redesigned_query: What technical diagram illustrates an aircraft's electrical power generation, distribution, ignition, and selected auxiliary systems?
EVAL-IMG-001.caption_text: This technical diagram illustrates an aircraft's electrical power generation distribution ignition and selected auxiliary systems.

EVAL-IMG-002.original_query: Fuel pressure is dropping during turns to the left but not to the right. Both tanks show same level on the gauges.
EVAL-IMG-002.redesigned_query: Show me the schematic illustrating a dual-tank fuel system with a selector valve, strainer, and delivery paths to a carburetor and engine primer.
EVAL-IMG-002.caption_text: This diagram illustrates a dual-tank fuel system with a selector valve strainer and delivery paths to a carburetor and engine primer.

EVAL-IMG-003.original_query: Fuel selector handle feels sloppy and won't stay in the 'both' position. Keeps drifting back toward left tank.
EVAL-IMG-003.redesigned_query: Exploded view schematic of the fuel selector's detent mechanism.
EVAL-IMG-003.caption_text: This is an exploded view of a mechanical assembly likely a valve or selector featuring a detent mechanism barrel O-rings and a snap ring.
EVAL-IMG-003.section_header: CUB CRAFTERS, INC. CC11-100 MAINTENANCE MANUAL | Page 258

EVAL-IMG-004.original_query: After a hard landing, there's a noticeable inward bow on the left main gear leg. Need to know what the attachment points look like to assess if the fuselage frame is damaged.
EVAL-IMG-004.redesigned_query: Show me a diagram of the main landing gear assembly, its components, and attachment hardware.
EVAL-IMG-004.caption_text: This diagram illustrates the front view of an aircraft's main landing gear assembly detailing its components and attachment hardware.

EVAL-IMG-005.original_query: Tail wheel shimmying badly during taxi. The springs seem fine visually but something in the steering mechanism is worn.
EVAL-IMG-005.redesigned_query: Show me the exploded view of the standard tail wheel assembly.

EVAL-IMG-006.original_query: Engine running rough at idle, sounds like one cylinder is missing. Pulled the plug wire on #2 cylinder and no change in RPM.
EVAL-IMG-006.redesigned_query: Show me an illustration of a central manifold connecting four external components.
EVAL-IMG-006.caption_text: A central manifold connecting four external components.

EVAL-IMG-007.original_query: Reinstalling the left wing after annual. Can't remember the correct order for the attachment bolts — there are four holes and I need to know which goes in first.
EVAL-IMG-007.redesigned_query: Show me the exploded view diagram of wing and lift strut mechanical attachments.
EVAL-IMG-007.caption_text: This technical diagram illustrates the detailed mechanical attachments for a wing and its supporting lift strut.

EVAL-IMG-008.original_query: After re-rigging the wings, the aircraft wants to roll left in straight-and-level. Need to verify washout angle measurement points.
EVAL-IMG-008.redesigned_query: Show me the technical diagram illustrating methods for measuring aircraft wing dihedral and washout.
EVAL-IMG-008.caption_text: This technical diagram illustrates methods for measuring aircraft wing dihedral and washout.

EVAL-IMG-009.original_query: Left flap doesn't seem to deploy as far as the right one. Where exactly do I put the protractor to check the deflection angle?
EVAL-IMG-009.redesigned_query: Show me the diagram for measuring flap deflection angle.
EVAL-IMG-009.caption_text: A digital level is used to measure the angle of an aircraft surface.

EVAL-IMG-010.original_query: Trim is heavy nose-up and won't hold position in cruise. The trim wheel moves freely but doesn't seem to be doing much.
EVAL-IMG-010.redesigned_query: Show me the diagram depicting a specialized strip with an attached sensor or device mounted on an aircraft wing.
EVAL-IMG-010.caption_text: A specialized strip with an attached sensor or device is mounted on an aircraft wing.

EVAL-IMG-011.original_query: Oil temp running high on hot days. Want to check the oil cooler lines for restrictions. Which fittings connect to the cooler?
EVAL-IMG-011.redesigned_query: Show me the diagram of the oil cooler and its connecting hose fittings.
EVAL-IMG-011.caption_text: An annotated view of an aircraft engine compartment featuring the oil cooler and other components.

EVAL-IMG-012.original_query: My GPS is getting power but the audio panel has gone dead. Both used to work fine. Avionics master is on.
EVAL-IMG-012.redesigned_query: Show me the schematic depicting wiring and connections for an aircraft's audio and intercom system.
EVAL-IMG-012.caption_text: This is a wiring diagram for an aircraft's audio and intercom system detailing connections for pilot co-pilot and various audio sources.

EVAL-IMG-013.original_query: Rudder feels stiff going to the left but free going right. Just replaced the rudder cables last month.
EVAL-IMG-013.redesigned_query: Show me the exploded view of the rudder cable fitting assembly.
EVAL-IMG-013.caption_text: This is an exploded view of a cable fitting assembly.

EVAL-IMG-014.original_query: Found a small tear in the wing fabric near a rib. Need to know the correct layering order for a patch repair — fabric, reinforcement tape, and rivet orientation.
EVAL-IMG-014.redesigned_query: Show me a diagram depicting a mechanical fastener securing multiple layered materials to a structural support.
EVAL-IMG-014.caption_text: A mechanical fastener secures multiple layered materials to a structural support.
EVAL-IMG-014.section_header: (6)  PATCH REPAIR MORE THAN 8 INCHES | Page 309

EVAL-IMG-015.original_query: Carb heat doesn't seem to be working — no RPM drop when I pull the handle. Cable moves at the cockpit end but not sure if the valve is actually opening.
EVAL-IMG-015.redesigned_query: Diagram showing the carburetor heat valve and its control cable installation.
EVAL-IMG-015.caption_text: An aircraft carburetor is shown connected to its air intake duct.

EVAL-IMG-016.original_query: Engine cuts out momentarily during steep climbs. Fuel pressure is fine on the ground. Electric fuel pump is running.
EVAL-IMG-016.redesigned_query: Show me the fuel system schematic.

EVAL-IMG-017.original_query: Left brake is spongy, right side is fine. Already bled both sides twice. Fluid level in reservoir looks good.
EVAL-IMG-017.redesigned_query: Show me the schematic diagram of the brake system.

EVAL-IMG-018.original_query: Noticed some free play in the stick when moving it laterally. Up-down motion is tight. Want to check the aileron linkage connection points.
EVAL-IMG-018.redesigned_query: Show me the diagram of the aileron control system.

EVAL-IMG-019.original_query: Elevator feels heavy and requires more back-pressure than normal to flare for landing. Push rods look intact visually.
EVAL-IMG-019.redesigned_query: Show me the diagram of the elevator control system.

EVAL-IMG-020.original_query: Rudder pedals return to center but there's a noticeable 'notch' or catch about halfway through right deflection.
EVAL-IMG-020.redesigned_query: Show me the diagram of the rudder control system.

EVAL-IMG-021.original_query: Aircraft seems to sit lower on the left side after landing. Both tires are properly inflated. Wondering if the left gear leg is cracked.
EVAL-IMG-021.redesigned_query: Show me the diagram of the fixed tricycle landing gear.

EVAL-IMG-022.original_query: Need to replace left main gear leg. There are inner and outer attachment bolts — which ones come out first during removal?
EVAL-IMG-022.redesigned_query: Exploded view diagram of the main landing gear assembly showing its components and attachment to the fuselage.

EVAL-IMG-023.original_query: Nose wheel is cocked slightly to the left when the aircraft is at rest. The rubber shock rope looks stretched and uneven.
EVAL-IMG-023.redesigned_query: Show me an exploded view of the nose landing gear assembly, including the bungees and rubber damper.

EVAL-IMG-024.original_query: Generator light came on in flight but avionics still seem to be working. How long can I fly on battery alone?
EVAL-IMG-024.redesigned_query: Show me the electrical system schematic diagram, including the generator and battery.

EVAL-IMG-025.original_query: Airspeed indicator reads zero on the ground but altimeter seems to work. Pitot tube looks clear visually.
EVAL-IMG-025.redesigned_query: Show me a diagram of the pitot-static system.

EVAL-IMG-026.original_query: Lost both SkyView screens simultaneously but engine instruments on the backup are still working. No breakers popped.
EVAL-IMG-026.redesigned_query: Show me the Dynon Skyview System schematic.

EVAL-IMG-027.original_query: Coolant temperature climbing above normal in cruise. Thermostat was just replaced. Wondering if the hose routing is correct — there are a lot of lines back there.
EVAL-IMG-027.redesigned_query: Show me the cooling system schematic illustrating hose routing.

EVAL-IMG-028.original_query: Flaps only deploy about half way. The lever in the cockpit reaches full travel. Something must be limiting the push rod movement.
EVAL-IMG-028.redesigned_query: Show me the diagram of the wing flap control system.

EVAL-IMG-029.original_query: Hearing a slight exhaust leak on the right side of the engine. Can smell exhaust in the cockpit when the heater is on.
EVAL-IMG-029.redesigned_query: Show me the system diagram of the exhaust system, including the muffler, exhaust tubes, and heat exchanger.

EVAL-IMG-030.original_query: After brake pad replacement, I'm not sure which way the allen bolts go back in. There seem to be several and I don't want to overtorque one side.
EVAL-IMG-030.redesigned_query: Show me the diagram illustrating the order of tightening the Allen bolts for the Beringer Jig.
EVAL-IMG-030.section_header: Aircraft Maintenance Manual AS-AMM-01-000 Beringer Jig | Page 426

EVAL-IMG-031.original_query: Cockpit is fogging up badly in humid conditions. The eyeball vents seem blocked. Where do the NACA intakes feed into the cabin?
EVAL-IMG-031.redesigned_query: Show me the system diagram for cockpit ventilation, including the ram air tunnel and air hose routing.

EVAL-IMG-032.original_query: Cabin heat only blows on the right side. Left footwell is cold. Heat control seems to work — warm air comes out, just not evenly.
EVAL-IMG-032.redesigned_query: Diagram of the cockpit heating system components and air flow.

EVAL-IMG-033.original_query: There's a weep of brake fluid at the nose wheel brake connection. The banjo bolt looks tight but there's a copper washer that might be the wrong thickness.
EVAL-IMG-033.redesigned_query: Show me a diagram depicting the assembly of nose banjo fittings for brake hoses.

EVAL-IMG-034.original_query: Oil is dripping from the bottom of the engine cowl. Can't tell if it's coming from the oil tank, a line, or the engine itself. Where are the likely drain points?
EVAL-IMG-034.redesigned_query: Show me the power plant location diagram.

EVAL-IMG-035.original_query: Doing the 100-hour fuel filter inspection. The filter bowl has two o-rings — do they both go back the same way or is there an up/down orientation?
EVAL-IMG-035.redesigned_query: Show me the exploded view diagram of the fuel filter assembly, detailing the placement of o-rings.

EVAL-IMG-036.original_query: After replacing the elevator trim actuator, the trim tab is at full nose-down when the indicator shows neutral. Need to verify the rigging reference point.
EVAL-IMG-036.redesigned_query: Diagram depicting the elevator control system adjustment with the actuator rod extended to 150 mm.

EVAL-IMG-037.original_query: Reinstalling the propeller after inspection. The manual says to torque the bolts in sequence but I can't figure out the pattern from the text alone.
EVAL-IMG-037.redesigned_query: Show me the propeller bolt tightening sequence diagram.

EVAL-IMG-038.original_query: Found a crack in the composite skin near the wing root fairing area. Need to identify the structural frame underneath to assess if it's a cosmetic vs structural issue.
EVAL-IMG-038.redesigned_query: Show me a diagram of the fuselage structure.

EVAL-IMG-039.original_query: One of the cowling fasteners is stripped and I need to replace it. There are different styles of fasteners on upper vs lower cowl halves. Which type is on the bottom?
EVAL-IMG-039.redesigned_query: Show me the diagram of the engine cowling fasteners for the upper and lower halves.

EVAL-IMG-040.original_query: After replacing the ignition leads, engine is running rough. Want to double-check the firing order. Cylinders aren't numbered anywhere on this Rotax engine.
EVAL-IMG-040.redesigned_query: Diagram of Rot Rotax engine firing order and cylinder numbering.

EVAL-IMG-041.original_query: Brakes are squealing on landing rollout. Pads still have material left but I want to check if they're worn unevenly. What does normal vs abnormal pad wear look like?
EVAL-IMG-041.redesigned_query: Show me the inspection diagram for brake pads.

EVAL-IMG-042.original_query: Have a dent about 15mm deep in the fuselage composite skin. It hasn't cracked through but it's delaminated at the edges. What class of repair is this?
EVAL-IMG-042.redesigned_query: Show me the inspection diagram for Repair Class 3.

EVAL-IMG-043.original_query: Need to weigh the aircraft for CG calculation. The manual references fuselage station 59.50 for the landing gear datum but I'm not sure where that is physically on the airplane.

EVAL-IMG-044.original_query: ELT did a false activation on the ground. Want to check if the G-switch connection is correct or if there's a wiring issue at the remote panel.
EVAL-IMG-044.redesigned_query: Show me the ELT schematic depicting connections to the remote control/indicator unit.
EVAL-IMG-044.caption_text: This diagram illustrates an Emergency Locator Transmitter (ELT) unit connected to an antenna and a remote control/indicator (RCPI) unit.

EVAL-IMG-045.original_query: Stall warning horn goes off too early — activates about 10 knots before actual stall. Need to adjust the vane position but not sure which way to move it.
